state.output:
import { HonoBase } from './hono-base'
import type { HonoOptions } from './hono-base'
import { RegExpRouter } from './router/reg-exp-router'
import { SmartRouter } from './router/smart-router'
import { TrieRouter } from './router/trie-router'
import type { BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema } from './types'

/**
 * The Hono class extends the functionality of the HonoBase class.
 * It sets up routing and allows for custom options to be passed.
 *
 * @template E - The environment type.
 * @template S - The schema type.
 * @template BasePath - The base path type.
 */
export class Hono<
  E extends Env = BlankEnv,
  S extends Schema = BlankSchema,
  BasePath extends string = '/',
> extends HonoBase<E, S, BasePath> {
  /**
   * Creates an instance of the Hono class.
   *
   * @param options - Optional configuration options for the Hono instance.
   */
  constructor(options: HonoOptions<E> = {}) {
    super(options)
    this.router =
      options.router ??
      new SmartRouter({
        routers: [new RegExpRouter(), new TrieRouter()],
      })
  }
}

metadata.output:
import { HonoBase } from './hono-base'
import type { HonoOptions } from './hono-base'
import { RegExpRouter } from './router/reg-exp-router'
import { SmartRouter } from './router/smart-router'
import { TrieRouter } from './router/trie-router'
import type { BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema } from './types'

/**
 * The Hono class extends the functionality of the HonoBase class.
 * It sets up routing and allows for custom options to be passed.
 *
 * @template E - The environment type.
 * @template S - The schema type.
 * @template BasePath - The base path type.
 */
export class Hono<
  E extends Env = BlankEnv,
  S extends Schema = BlankSchema,
  BasePath extends string = '/',
> extends HonoBase<E, S, BasePath> {
  /**
   * Creates an instance of the Hono class.
   *
   * @param options - Optional configuration options for the Hono instance.
   */
  constructor(options: HonoOptions<E> = {}) {
    super(options)
    this.router =
      options.router ??
      new SmartRouter({
        routers: [new RegExpRouter(), new TrieRouter()],
      })
  }
}

input.content:
# Routing Read/Write Ledger

## src/hono.ts
- Purpose: Main Hono class entry point that extends HonoBase and sets up default router configuration
- Names noticed: Hono class, SmartRouter default, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, HonoBase
- Simple note: Entry point factory class that configures routers by default

## src/hono-base.ts
- Purpose: Core Hono framework base class with routing, path handling, middleware, and HTTP handler infrastructure
- Names noticed: Hono class, HonoOptions, HonoBase, getPath, methods (get/post/put/delete/options/patch), #addRoute, #dispatch, route(), basePath(), onError(), notFound(), mount()
- Simple note: Base implementation containing all core functionality; extended by Hono class

## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
- Purpose: Module export file for LinearRouter
- Names noticed: LinearRouter (export)
- Simple note: Re-exports LinearRouter class from router.ts

## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
- Purpose: LinearRouter implementation - routes all methods to a single path array and linear search on match
- Names noticed: LinearRouter class, #routes array, ROUTES_LOOP labels, ROUTES methods, add(), match(), splitPathRe, splitByStarRe
- Simple note: Sequential route matching; fast for few routes, slow with many; supports static paths, labels (:name), and wildcards (*)

## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
- Purpose: Module export file for PatternRouter
- Names noticed: PatternRouter (export)
- Simple note: Re-exports PatternRouter class from router.ts

## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
- Purpose: PatternRouter implementation using regex compilation for path patterns
- Names noticed: PatternRouter class, Route type, #routes array, add(), match(), emptyParams
- Simple note: Converts paths to one or more regexes at match time; uses single or multiple routes per path

## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
- Purpose: Module export file for RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, buildAndExportAllMatchers, serializeInitParams
- Simple note: Exports both dynamic (RegExpRouter) and serialized (PreparedRegExpRouter) variants

## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
- Purpose: RegExpRouter main implementation
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter class, #middleware, #routes, buildWildCardRegExp, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, findMiddleware, buildAllMatchers(), buildAndExportAllMatchers()
- Simple note: Dynamically builds regex matcher at match time; handles static paths and patterns; memoizes for performance

## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
- Purpose: Common matcher interface for RegExpRouter
- Names noticed: Matcher type, MatcherMap type, HandlerData type, StaticMap, ParamIndexMap, match(), emptyParam
- Simple note: Defines regex + handlerData + staticMap structure; compiles routes to static map or regex matcher

## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
- Purpose: Trie node implementation for pattern-based tree structure
- Names noticed: Node class, PATH_ERROR symbol, Context class, compareKey(), insert(), buildRegExpStr()
- Simple note: Tree node with literal/special regex/literal regex key; inserts tokens and builds regex pattern for this subtree

## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
- Purpose: Trie root class for building the entire route tree
- Names noticed: Trie class, ReplacementMap type, #context, #root Node, insert(), buildRegExp()
- Simple note: Processes all paths, replaces groups, extracts tokens; returns built regex and param/handl index maps

## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
- Purpose: PreparedRegExpRouter for pre-compiled router at initialization
- Names notice: PreparedRegExpRouter class, #matchers, #relocateMap, #addWildcard(), #addPath(), buildInitParams(), serializeInitParams()
- Simple note: Compilable router; adds routes once at init; fast matching after build; used with serialize to share across processes

## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
- Purpose: Module export file for SmartRouter
- Names noticed: SmartRouter (export)
- Simple note: Re-exports SmartRouter class from router.ts

## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
- Purpose: SmartRouter implementation - switches to appropriate router dynamically based on registration order
- Names noticed: SmartRouter class, #routers array, #routes array, add(), match(), get activeRouter
- Simple note: Uses first router that can handle all registered routes; switches once; combines multiple router strategies

## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
- Purpose: Module export file for TrieRouter
- Names noticed: TrieRouter (export)
- Simple note: Re-exports TrieRouter class from router.ts

## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
- Purpose: TrieRouter implementation using tree structure for O(log n) route lookup
- Names noticed: TrieRouter class, #node Node, add(), match()
- Simple note: Tree structure indexed by path; each node holds methods/handlers; fast O(log n) matching

## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
- Purpose: Trie node implementation with tree traversal logic for pattern matching
- Names noticed: Node class, #methods array, #children, #patterns, insert(), search()
- Simple note: Tree node with literal children and pattern children; search visits multiple nodes to find all matches

## src/router/common.case.test.ts
- Purpose: Shared test helper for testing all router implementations
- Names noticed: runTest() function, getSuiteHierarchy(), match() wrapper
- Simple note: Runs the same test suite across different router instantiations, with optional skip rules

## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
- Purpose: PatternRouter specific test file
- Names noticed: PatternRouter tests, Duplicate param name, Trailing slash, skip rules
- Simple note: Tests PatternRouter behavior including limitations that make it throw UnsupportedPathError

## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
- Purpose: LinearRouter specific test file
- Names noticed: LinearRouter tests, Multi match params, trailing slash, skip UnsupportedPath tests
- Simple note: Tests LinearRouter behavior; skips cases it cannot handle due to linear algorithm design

## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
- Purpose: RegExpRouter specific test file
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter tests, Return value type, UnsupportedPathError (parent/child/multiple handlers)
- Simple note: Tests RegExpRouter regex compilation and matching, including edge cases that cause unsupported path errors

## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
- Purpose: SmartRouter specific test file
- Names noticed: SmartRouter, wrap runs RegExpRouter + TrieRouter
- Simple note: SmartRouter delegates to sub-routers dynamically; tests combined behavior with RegExp+TrieRouter

## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
- Purpose: TrieRouter specific test file
- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest() calls common cases
- Simple note: Runs common test suite; handles all cases that common.case.test covers

## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
- Purpose: Trie node specific test file
- Names noticed: Root Node tests, insert/search test cases, sort order, wildcards, regex, trailing slash, duplicate params
- Simple note: Comprehensive unit tests for Node insert/search, including sort order and various pattern types

## Cross-File Checklist
- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts
- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts
- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts

# Routing Read/Write Ledger

## src/hono.ts
- Purpose: Main Hono class entry point that extends HonoBase and sets up default router configuration
- Names noticed: Hono class, SmartRouter default, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, HonoBase
- Simple note: Entry point factory class that configures routers by default

## src/hono-base.ts
- Purpose: Core Hono framework base class with routing, path handling, middleware, and HTTP handler infrastructure
- Names noticed: Hono class, HonoOptions, HonoBase, getPath, methods (get/post/put/delete/options/patch), #addRoute, #dispatch, route(), basePath(), onError(), notFound(), mount()
- Simple note: Base implementation containing all core functionality; extended by Hono class

## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
- Purpose: Module export file for LinearRouter
- Names noticed: LinearRouter (export)
- Simple note: Re-exports LinearRouter class from router.ts

## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
- Purpose: LinearRouter implementation - routes all methods to a single path array and linear search on match
- Names noticed: LinearRouter class, #routes array, ROUTES_LOOP labels, ROUTES methods, add(), match(), splitPathRe, splitByStarRe
- Simple note: Sequential route matching; fast for few routes, slow with many; supports static paths, labels (:name), and wildcards (*)

## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
- Purpose: Module export file for PatternRouter
- Names noticed: PatternRouter (export)
- Simple note: Re-exports PatternRouter class from router.ts

## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
- Purpose: PatternRouter implementation using regex compilation for path patterns
- Names noticed: PatternRouter class, Route type, #routes array, add(), match(), emptyParams
- Simple note: Converts paths to one or more regexes at match time; uses single or multiple routes per path

## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
- Purpose: Module export file for RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, buildAndExportAllMatchers, serializeInitParams
- Simple note: Exports both dynamic (RegExpRouter) and serialized (PreparedRegExpRouter) variants

## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
- Purpose: RegExpRouter main implementation
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter class, #middleware, #routes, buildWildCardRegExp, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, findMiddleware, buildAllMatchers(), buildAndExportAllMatchers()
- Simple note: Dynamically builds regex matcher at match time; handles static paths and patterns; memoizes for performance

## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
- Purpose: Common matcher interface for RegExpRouter
- Names noticed: Matcher type, MatcherMap type, HandlerData type, StaticMap, ParamIndexMap, match(), emptyParam
- Simple note: Defines regex + handlerData + staticMap structure; compiles routes to static map or regex matcher

## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
- Purpose: Trie node implementation for pattern-based tree structure
- Names noticed: Node class, PATH_ERROR symbol, Context class, compareKey(), insert(), buildRegExpStr()
- Simple note: Tree node with literal/special regex/literal regex key; inserts tokens and builds regex pattern for this subtree

## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
- Purpose: Trie root class for building the entire route tree
- Names noticed: Trie class, ReplacementMap type, #context, #root Node, insert(), buildRegExp()
- Simple note: Processes all paths, replaces groups, extracts tokens; returns built regex and param/handl index maps

## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
- Purpose: PreparedRegExpRouter for pre-compiled router at initialization
- Names notice: PreparedRegExpRouter class, #matchers, #relocateMap, #addWildcard(), #addPath(), buildInitParams(), serializeInitParams()
- Simple note: Compilable router; adds routes once at init; fast matching after build; used with serialize to share across processes

- Purpose: Module export file for SmartRouter
- Names noticed: SmartRouter (export)
- Simple note: Re-exports SmartRouter class from router.ts

## src/router/smart-router/router.ts

- Names noticed: SmartRouter class, #routers array, #routes array, add(), match(), get activeRouter
- Simple note: Uses first router that can handle all registered routes; switches once; combines multiple router strategies
